text:
A bear sat munching on berries in a forest.

Suddenly, a cat sneaked up behind him.

"The berries!" gasped the bear.

The cat meowed hungrily.

The bear shook his head.

"He wouldn't take them." thought the bear.

And the bear grinned.

He picked a berry.

The cat growled menacingly.

The bear ate another berry.

The cat growled persistently.

But deep down, the cat couldn't resist.

Slowly, he nibbled one berry.

Then another.

Then another.

At last...

"Oh."

The bear winked.

"You're just like me." The cat confessed.

And they had berry dinner together.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
